## Risk and compatibility

## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no unrelated files.
- [ ] Tests cover new behavior and important failure paths.
- [ ] The complete test suite passes.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` and repository documentation match live behavior.
- [ ] No secrets, caches, local agent state, or private data are included.
- [ ] Acceptance checks were not weakened to make the change pass.
